---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **VS Code Version:** (e.g. 1.90.0)
- **Extension Version:** (e.g. 0.4.0)
- **AI Tool:** (e.g. Claude Code)
- **Light Hardware:** (e.g. Tapo L900-5, or N/A)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.
